        FAQs

        What methods are available for depositing funds into my account? +
        The methods available for funding your account are by cryptocurrency (Bitcoin, Ethereum and Litecoin). We do not accept Fiat on our trading platform as we are fully a cryptocurrency company
        What documents do I need to provide when opening an account? +
        You will need to provide a copy of a valid government-issued ID. (Passport, driver’s license, ID card)
        Does uploading my document automatically get my account verified? +
        Immediately you upload your document, we would process it for verification and a success or denied notification would be sent to you by mail
        What are the available methods of withdrawal? +
        To withdraw from your balance, you will have to provide a wallet address (Bitcoin, Bitcoin cash, Ethereum, Litecoin, Dash). Your address will be credited instantly. Please note that for a newly funded account, a minimum of 5 working days must elapse before funds can be withdrawn.
        What is the minimum amount for deposit when opening an account? +
        The minimum deposit amount will depend on the base currency of your account of $500 or its equivalent in EUR, GBR and AUD
        What can I trade with Binoptix? +
        Binoptix is dedicated to providing a variety of cryptocurrencies for trade based on the prevailing price and fluctuations.
        Can I trade tokens also on Binoptix? +
        We are currently working on that and can assure you we would be trading tokens very soon on Binoptix.
        Does third party trade access my account completely? +
        The API used for third party trades allows access into your trade area only. The third party is completely and securely restricted from account operations such as deposit and withdrawal of funds.

        Get Started In 30 Seconds!

        Create Account

        Sign up with your email and enter a 6-digit code sent to your inbox to get started.
